│    Sev     │ Detector                   │ Title                                         │   Line │
├────────────┼────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│  🟠 HIGH   │ unsafe_raw_call            │ Unchecked raw_call in withdraw()              │     12 │
│   🔵 LOW   │ timestamp_dependence       │ Timestamp dependence in settle()              │     30 │
╰────────────┴────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────╯

  🟠 HIGH  Unchecked raw_call in withdraw()
    raw_call return value is not checked.
    Source:
      raw_call(msg.sender, b"", value=amount)
    💡 Fix: Wrap raw_call in assert.

  🔵 LOW  Timestamp dependence in settle()
    block.timestamp used in condition.
    Source:
      if block.timestamp > self.deadline:
    💡 Fix: Use oracle/time-window checks.

  Detectors run: 2 │ Findings: 2 │ Use --fix to auto-patch
